title: Oil and Gas Stocks Topped S&P 500 Returns This Quarter as Crude Prices Surged
text: Oil and gas companies featured heavily in the list of top-performing S&P 500 companies in the third quarter, as rising crude prices lifted the outlook for profits.

title: 4 Stocks Worth Considering in the U.S. Upstream Industry
text: Following a careful analysis of the Zacks Oil and Gas - Exploration and Production - United States industry, we advise focusing on companies like APA, NOG, GRNT and EPM.

title: APA Corporation and TotalEnergies Announce Oil Project of 200,000 b/d in Block 58 and Launch Development Studies with the Objective of Sanctioning the Project by Year-end 2024
text: HOUSTON, Sept. 13, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) and TotalEnergies have announced the launching of development studies for a large oil project in Block 58, offshore Suriname. TotalEnergies is the operator of Block 58, with a 50% interest, alongside APA (50%).

title: APA Corp.: Suriname Is Looking Good
text: APA Corporation reported net income of $381 million in 2Q23, with adjusted earnings of $0.85 per diluted share. APA's stock performance has seen a 13% increase over the past year, making it a suitable long-term investment in the oil industry. The potential growth in Offshore Suriname, where APA owns a 50% stake in block 58 and a 45% stake in block 53, makes the company attractive.

title: Oil May Hit $100 Before the Holidays: 6 Industry Giants to Buy Now for Growth and Big Dividends
text: Since topping out at $120 a barrel back in the summer of 2022, the major oil benchmarks traded down every month until bottoming last December.

title: APA Corporation Declares Cash Dividend on Common Shares
text: HOUSTON, Sept. 12, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) has declared a regular cash dividend on the company's common shares.

title: Why Is APA (APA) Up 5.2% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: APA (APA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
